---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

## Projects

Clinical trials, systematic reviews, and population health research — documented in R.

---

## Featured Projects

```{=html}
<div class="project-card">
  <h3>IRONWOMAN RCT — Double-Blind Randomised Controlled Trial</h3>
  <p>A Phase III double-blind, placebo-controlled randomised controlled trial examining the efficacy and safety of intravenous iron supplementation in iron-deficient exercising females. Includes protocol development, randomisation strategy, longitudinal biomarker tracking, and mixed-effects statistical analysis. Published in BJSM, 2025.</p>
  <div class="project-tags">
    <span class="project-tag">R</span>
    <span class="project-tag">lme4</span>
    <span class="project-tag">RCT Design</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Clinical Trials</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Women's Health</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
  <h3><a href="meta-analysis.html" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;">Systematic Review & Meta-Analysis — Iron Supplementation in Non-Anaemic Iron Deficiency</a></h3>
  <p>Comprehensive systematic review and random-effects meta-analysis of intravenous iron supplementation for non-anaemic iron deficiency across clinical populations. Includes forest plots, funnel plots, heterogeneity assessment (I²), publication bias analysis, and subgroup investigations. Cited by WHO. <a href="meta-analysis.html" class="project-tag" style="text-decoration: none;">View Full Analysis →</a></p>
  <div class="project-tags">
    <span class="project-tag">R</span>
    <span class="project-tag">metafor</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Systematic Review</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Meta-Analysis</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Forest Plots</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
  <h3>Population Iron Deficiency Screening — 10,000+ Females</h3>
  <p>Large-scale population screening study characterising iron deficiency prevalence, clinical presentation, and biomarker profiles across sporting populations, shopping centres, and universities. Cross-sectional survey design with comprehensive iron biomarker assessment. Results published across multiple journals including Vox Sanguinis, 2025.</p>
  <div class="project-tags">
    <span class="project-tag">R</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Cross-sectional Survey</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Epidemiology</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Women's Health</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Population Health</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
  <h3>DARP Trial — Phase IV RCT in Type 1 Diabetes</h3>
  <p>Chief Investigator on a Phase IV randomised controlled trial examining whether drinking water before and during exercise in heat increases hypoglycaemia risk in individuals with type 1 diabetes. NHMRC-funded ($60K). Ongoing study with Prof. Paul Fournier, UWA.</p>
  <div class="project-tags">
    <span class="project-tag">R</span>
    <span class="project-tag">RCT Design</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Type 1 Diabetes</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Exercise Physiology</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Clinical Trials</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
  <h3>Altitude & Type 1 Diabetes — Effects on Blood Glucose During Exercise</h3>
  <p>Honours thesis investigating simulated high-altitude effects on blood glucose regulation during exercise in individuals with type 1 diabetes. Published in JCEM, 2022 (Altmetric 395; 50+ news outlets). Demonstrates the translational value of physiological research for clinical practice.</p>
  <div class="project-tags">
    <span class="project-tag">R</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Exercise Physiology</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Type 1 Diabetes</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Altitude Simulation</span>
    <span class="project-tag">Clinical Translation</span>
  </div>
</div>
```
